title: No information about parameterized view columns is returned.
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
Can't get the the information about parameterized view's columns.
Here is the example: https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/2b675b3f-ce3a-48c0-b186-a5fbff976d49
Expected return is
```
id	Int16	NO		\N		\N	Test comment
```
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
CREATE TABLE users (uid Int16, name String, age Int16) ENGINE=Memory;
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1231, 'John', 33);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (6666, 'Ksenia', 48);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (8888, 'Alice', 50);
CREATE VIEW v_users (id Int16 COMMENT 'Test comment') AS SELECT id FROM "users" WHERE age > {age:Int16};
SHOW FULL COLUMNS IN v_users;
### Expected behavior
```
id	Int16	NO		\N		\N	Test comment
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
poc: CREATE TABLE users (uid Int16, name String, age Int16) ENGINE=Memory;
CREATE VIEW v_users (id Int16 COMMENT 'Test comment') AS SELECT id FROM "users" WHERE age > {age:Int16};
key_bug_features: SHOW FULL COLUMNS IN parameterized view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (uid Int16, name String, age Int16, email Nullable(String)) ENGINE=Memory;
CREATE VIEW v_users (id Int16 COMMENT 'Test comment', user_email Nullable(String)) AS SELECT uid AS id, email FROM users WHERE age > {age:Int16};
